languages.text: "Офицеры моего корабля никогда не будут ждать в очереди. Пропустите их".
"No officer on my ship will ever have to stand in a queue. Let them through."
languages.original_text: "Офицеры моего корабля никогда не будут ждать в очереди. Пропустите их".

traits.locale_text: "No officer on my ship will ever have to stand in a queue. Let them through."
"No officer on my ship will ever have to stand in a queue. Let them through."
"No officer on my ship will ever have to stand in a queue. Let them through."

languages.text: 「私の船の乗組員は、決して列に並ばなければならないことはない。通してくれ」
languages.original_text: "No officer on my ship will ever have to stand in a queue. Let them through."

languages.text: "Benim gemimdeki subaylar, asla sırada beklemek zorunda kalmayacak. Geçmelerine izin verin."
languages.original_text: "No officer on my ship will ever have to stand in a queue. Let them through."

traits.locale_text: "Benim gemimdeki subaylar, asla sırada beklemek zorunda kalmayacak. Geçmelerine izin verin."

languages.text: “在我的舰船上，没有军官需要排队。让他们先接受诊治。”
languages.original_text: "No officer on my ship will ever have to stand in a queue. Let them through."

traits.locale_text: “在我的舰船上，没有军官需要排队。让他们先接受诊治。”

languages.text: "Auf meinem Schiff muss kein Offizier Schlange stehen. Lasst sie durch."
languages.original_text: "No officer on my ship will ever have to stand in a queue. Let them through."

traits.locale_text: "Auf meinem Schiff muss kein Offizier Schlange stehen. Lasst sie durch."

languages.text: « À mon bord, les officiers ne font pas la queue. Qu'on les laisse passer. »
languages.original_text: "No officer on my ship will ever have to stand in a queue. Let them through."

traits.locale_text: « À mon bord, les officiers ne font pas la queue. Qu'on les laisse passer. »

languages.text: «Ninguno de los oficiales de mi nave hará cola. Deje que pasen».
languages.original_text: "No officer on my ship will ever have to stand in a queue. Let them through."

traits.locale_text: «Ninguno de los oficiales de mi nave hará cola. Deje que pasen».
